violations.text: Retail reach-in freezer observed in poor repair at the time of inspection. Per PIC, work order is in place. Unit was out of service prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary products. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
Wall behind compactor was observed unfinish (insulation exposed). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2024

The floors in the retail sales area has an accumulation of soil residue, litter and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2025

The door to the outside, located near the dumpster, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Per PIC, door sweep is on order. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

Walk-in cooler, and walk in freezer were observed in poor repair at the time of inspection. Per PIC, work order is in place for parts. No TCS foods to be stored in units that are in poor repair. Units were out of service prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary products. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
Wall behind compactor was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per PIC, work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2024

The door to the outside, located near the dumpster, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

Reach-in freezers, walk-in cooler, and walk-in freezer were in poor repair at time of inspection. Per PIC, work orders are in place. No potentially hazardous foods to be stored in units that are in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
Air conditioning system was in poor repair during time of inspection. Per PIC, parts are on order to repair system. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary products. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
Wall behind compactor was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2024
